sql: SELECT strategy_id AS s, COALESCE(execution_mode,'shadow') AS mode, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(entry_drift_pct),3) AS avg_drift, ROUND(AVG(ABS(entry_drift_pct)),3) AS avg_absdrift, ROUND(AVG(gross_pct),3) AS avg_gross, ROUND(AVG(size_sol),4) AS avg_sz, ROUND(AVG(jito_tip_sol),6) AS avg_tip, ROUND(AVG(ata_rent_sol),6) AS avg_rent, ROUND(AVG(detection_lag_sec),2) AS avg_detlag FROM copy_trades WHERE status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL GROUP BY strategy_id, execution_mode ORDER BY n DESC
